creator: philip@ridecharge.com
text:
Is the problem in nrpe2 itself, or in the FreeBSD openssl libs ?

Also, is it worth it to upgrade it and mark BROKEN if WITH_SSL=yes ?

I don't use SSL for nrpe/nagios communications so this works fine for me:)
